title: 高松宮記念の後に・伝え合う熱！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I was able to put on my best performance today!
My passion reached Ardan without issue and
inspired her to start working toward her dream
again!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My next goal is the race that decides the Ruler of
the Mile for the first half of the year, the Yasuda
Kinen! Watch out, 'cause I'm gonna win that
battle too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Later, I happen upon Chiyono O, working hard on
her recovery! She's been training so seriously, it
makes me want to do the same!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You can do it, Chiyono O! I can't wait to see you
in a race again!
